markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a strategic report for the Ambient client.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Urgent Report:** Talal will create a strategic report for Ambient's leadership meeting on Feb 17. The report must tell a compelling story of progress to secure buy-in for continued work.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Strategic Opportunities:** The report will also identify high-potential expansion opportunities (e.g., glossary, gated assets) to grow the client's content program.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**AEO Dashboard Fix:** Bailey will use Talal's AEO playbook to overhaul Ambient's Scrunch prompts, which are currently showing 0% signal due to poor quality.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Deadline:** Talal's report is due Jan 30, allowing it to include all of January's performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

## Topics

### Ambient Client Context

  - [**Relationship History:** The client relationship requires trust-rebuilding after multiple account manager handoffs (Ada → Mara → Joe → Bailey).](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Positive:** Content is indexing, keyword footprint and traffic are growing.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Concern:** Low CTRs on content clusters suggest a need to investigate titles and metadata.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [**Reporting Gap:** Past performance reports are missing from Notion. Bailey will provide links to Joe's live walkthrough and any reports found from Mara.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Strategic Report for Feb 17 Meeting

  - [**Goal:** Create a compelling narrative of progress for Ambient's leadership meeting to secure buy-in for continued and expanded work.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [A monthly performance rollup.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [A strategic retro highlighting key wins and progress.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Actionable recommendations (e.g., sticky blog CTAs).](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [**Expansion Opportunities:** Analyze client-suggested ideas for potential expansion:](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Glossary](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Repurposing webinars into gated assets](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Creating unique data-driven content (e.g., state-by-state incident reports)](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### AEO Dashboard Fix

  - [**Problem:** Ambient's Scrunch dashboard shows 0% signal, likely due to poor default prompts generated by the tool.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Solution:** Bailey will use Talal's AEO playbook to create high-quality, persona-driven prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Future State:** Talal and Kyle are developing an Atlas workflow to auto-generate 150–200 structured prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [Add required assets to the Linear ticket:](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
          - [Project start date](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
          - [Access to content tools](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
          - [List of published articles](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
          - [Competitor website example](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Share links to Joe's walkthrough and any reports found from Mara.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [Use the AEO playbook to overhaul Scrunch prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Talal:**](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [Review Bailey's December report to define data needs.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [Deliver the strategic report by Jan 30.](https://fathom.video/share/oF4mKrpxanxPb8AyxngcJcdCK16KVkep?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
